title: cydonia oblonga subsp. maliformis
intro: Cydonia oblonga subsp. maliformis, also known as the edible pear melon, is a subspecies of the Cydonia oblonga plant, belonging to the Rosaceae family. It has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory, antioxidant, and antimicrobial effects. The edible pear melon has been reported to have various health benefits, such as reducing fever, alleviating digestive issues, and supporting immune function. The plant is often prepared as a tea, decoction, or tincture for its medicinal use, and its fruits can also be eaten raw or used in jams and preserves.
